game.title: Mobia's Trip
game.short_text: Screen-wrap your way around the world!

details.title: Mobia's Trip
details.description:
Make sure you read the controls!
Native Windows, Mac, and Linux (x64) versions also available below. If you don't hear music or have performance issues, please try one of those!


Mobia wanders off into the mist... everything looks so familiar!
Mobia's Trip is a puzzle platformer about screen loops and strange geometry. Position your firefly correctly to phase through walls, gain momentum, and perform cool rolling tricks to unlock new areas!
Who knows what secrets the forest might hold!


08/08/2025 v2 patch notes 
- reimplemented sign that explains controls for locking
- Fixed issue where respawning would sometimes cause you to be stuck inside the wall
- Made intro segment less confusing by making shining light brighter
- Fixed issue where intro segment light wouldn't cut to black
- Fixed bug where you could regain control after the credits started rolling
- Updated ending animation
Want more from us?
Wishlist our game on steam!
We're working on a full game, that's also a puzzle platformer! Play the free demo and drop us a wishlist, it helps a ton!https://store.steampowered.com/app/2755990/Miss_Paint/Join our discord server!https://discord.gg/kt8CEd3fTN

game.title: PhotoLoop
game.short_text: Edit photos for commissioners using your horribly outdated editing software, PhotoLoop!

details.title: PhotoLoop
details.description:
PhotoLoop
PhotoLoop is a casual game about editing photos using an outdated editing software that only has the lasso tool. Make sure to make your edits clean and concise, or you might not be able to pay your rent due in five days!
Leave your best edits in the comments below!
Controls
This game can be played completely using the mouse. There are some keyboard shortcuts in the PhotoLoop App. 
CTRL + X: Cut selectionCTRL + C: Copy selectionCTRL + V: Paste selection
Listen to the soundtrack here
Interested in chatting/our other games? Join our Discord!
.
.
.
(Pssst... We are also working on a forest builder tower defense called NuTREEnts, which you can wishlist on Steam!)

game.title: SIDE EFFECTS
game.short_text: Nothing Says Loop Like A Good Ol' Cube

details.title: SIDE EFFECTS
details.description:
How to Play
RMB - Rotate CameraLMB - Interact with CubeThe cube is the loop. Turn it once, and everything changes. Turn it again, and you're back where you started... but different!
Rotate rows and columns of the 2x2x2 cube to move objects across different faces.
Each face has a unique effect, watch the icons above each one. Water hydrates. Fire incinerates. Time does weird stuff.
Sequence matters: Water → Sun = blooming flower. Sun → Water = plant soup.
Your goal: Get every object into its final form (flower, chick, robot, etc.) and land them all on the same side of the cube.
Objects loop through life cycles: dead trees can regrow, robots can reboot, frogs can become eggs again. Use the loop. Abuse the loop. Worship the loop. Loop de Loop.

game.title: SongRunner
game.short_text: A music-based platformer made for the 2025 GMTK Game Jam

details.title: SongRunner
details.description:
This is SongRunner!
SongRunner is a puzzle platformer where the platforms are your own musical loops! Speed through dozens of handcrafted single-screen platforming challenges while creating platforms in time with a high energy original soundtrack! 
Made for Game Maker's Toolkit's 2025 game jam (and featured as a favorite!). The original jam submission version for Windows can be downloaded below.
Controls
Create platforms: Keyboard keys 1-8 (use the number keys above QWERTY) Move: Left/Right Arrows or A / DJump: SpaceReset level: Tab
Game Tips
Played notes will "snap" into place. If they snap over a level platform, the note will be discarded. If they snap over another existing note, the existing note will be discarded. Level timers start when the player leaves the starting platform or plays any note. Earn a yellow star for completing levels before the star time bar runs out! Earn blue stars by... um... wait how do you earn blue stars..?
Credits
color palette inspiration - https://www.pixilart.com/palettes/wolf-32-13141font - https://fonts.google.com/share?selection.family=Bagel+Fat+Oneinput icons - https://kenney.nl/assets/input-promptskey art - https://www.artstation.com/philcavalcanti

details.title: Loophole Pie
details.description:
DEV UPDATE: I started development on a co-op version of this concept that will be more elaborate and polished than this 4-day prototype! If you want to stay updated on this project, consider following me on itch or checking out my youtube channel, I will be posting updates there: Haastregt - YouTubeTry to get to the fresh pie the neighbours baked! They keep imposing rules to avoid you getting to it based on your last run. Try to find new loopholes to get to the pie!I found about 20 ways to get to the pie myself, but you may find new or other ways! Post a comment what your most creative loophole was!
Known issues:- For aspect ratios other than 16:9, the UI will look a bit messed up. You can still play in the browser in HD by playing minimized to overcome this issue. If you have a FullHD, QHD or 4K screen, make sure to press the full-screen button when playing in the browser!- The physics are a little bit wonky sometimes.
Watch the video for an idea of what loopholes are possible, but again you might have found others that I didn't! 
I hope you enjoy! Feedback is appreciated!
Credits:- Linnea: Without her support I would not have been able to put in the time and effort this weekend.  She also was a great playtester!
- Character & Animation: asset made by João Baltieri- Background music: Claude Debussy Prelude 1 No. 12 Minstrels, played by Walter Gieseking (1953)- Sound effects from Mixkit: paper, opening fence, pickup item, wood breaking, metal/stone/wood landing, bird sounds, compost sounds, falling tree- Fonts: Rushing Shine by MJType, Anima Ace by BlamBot- Speech/thought bubbles by macrovector: link
All other assets were created by me during the game jam.Either play in the browser or download the windows build. 
For the windows build, unzip the folder and double-click the .exe file to start the game

game.title: Curse of the Amethyst Skull
game.short_text: GMTK 2025. Following the letter of a famous explorer you journey into the legendary Temple of the Amethyst skull.

details.title: Curse of the Amethyst Skull
details.description:
You receive a mysterious letter claiming to be from a famous adventurer, along with a notepad and unfinished map leading you to the legendary Temple of the Amethyst Skull. Each time the ruins defeat an adventurer, a new one is lured in,  receiving the map and notebook from the previous explorer. You will be learning from your mistakes while solving puzzles, dodging deadly traps and hunting for an ancient treasure in this hybrid old-school dungeon crawler meets point and click adventure that has you equal parts archaeologist and cartographer.
 Can you stop the cycle of adventurers meeting grizzly ends and break the Curse of the Amethyst Skull for good?
The blue question marks on the main screen and when the map is open, show the tutorials for the game.
Made for GMTK 2025 using the Godot Engine.

Developed by Cozy Frog Games
Art, 3D Modelling and Voice acting by Matsta76
Coding by Lady Strella
Music and SFX from Pixabay

If you enjoyed our game this year, please consider checking out our most recent game on Steam called Interstellar Plunderer.

game.title: RHYTHMETRIC
game.short_text: Choose your rhythm wisely if you hope to defeat your geometric foes!

details.title: RHYTHMETRIC
details.description:
PLAY IN FULLSCREEN WITH SOUND ON FOR THE BEST EXPERIENCE!
Defeat your geometric foes by placing attack, move, and shield elements in a rhythmic sequence to catchy music loops. 
Warning: Levels 4 and 5 are difficult (but passable)!

Controls:

A - Attack, S - Shield, D - Dash. Each in the direction of your mouse or cursor.
Made for Mark Brown's GMTK Game Jam 2025. Jam theme: Loop!
This game pays homage to Soul Knight, Geometry Wars, and Laserwave from the 2020 GMTK Game Jam.
NOTE: Because this is a graphics intensive game, it did not run well in Web GL, so my jam entry this year is an executable. Download the zip and extract it. RHYTHMETRIC.exe will be in the folder. Thanks for playing!

Will be developed into a full Steam release!
Join the discord here: https://discord.gg/pzZnD5Av2hThank you everyone for your interest! I'm currently working on college apps, so progress might be slow for a short while!

game.title: Night OClock
game.short_text: Solve puzzles during a time loop to uncover the identity of a murderer.

details.title: Night OClock
details.description:
You’re a detective who came to a mansion to solve a murder.
 
But during the investigation, you were poisoned — with only one minute left to live.
 
Each time you die, time resets. The mansion returns to its original state… but your memories and items remain.
 
Using this cursed loop to your advantage, can you solve the puzzles the victim left behind and uncover the truth before time runs out?
WASD to Move (or ZQSD)Shift to RunSpace to Jump and ClimbLeft Click to Push Objects


CREDITS:
- 3D Models from Sketchfab: Peter Nox, StevenTB, RG Poly, KOMiRA, ROY, em_kei, Maxine, Pippa, dodopro505, Blank2574, Alex Krush, Unreal Designer, Mehdi Shahsavan, Inknot
- SFX: Nox_Sound, flamesound
- Textures: FreeStylized.com, Shaz, AmbientCg.com
- Donwload the .zip file
- Extract it
- Execute "Night OClock.exe"
- Enjoy the game, rate and leave a comment :)

details.title: KILLOVER
details.description:
Kill the past over and over
Loop each time you kill all your previous lives, but beware not to be shot or touch them for an indomitable death.

  

Clean the floor fast in this stylish third-person shooter to score high and aim for the top of the online leaderboard.


Move with WASD (or ZQSD for AZERTY keyboards)
Aim with RIGHT CLICK or SHIFT
Shoot with LEFT CLICK, jump with SPACE
Throw the sword with RIGHT CLICK
P to pause, but you won't escape your past
Fullscreen button on the bottom right of the game

  
Assets credits:

  Kenney:  Blaster Kit


  poly.pizza:  Party Glasses


  Vitalezzz:  Hunter-class Lifeform


  Kevin Iglesias:  Human ;Character Dummy
Be sure to check Mister Kil escapes from the Killer Robots Mountain, the newest adventures of the KILLOVER protagonist!

details.title: Goop Snake ⭐️
details.description:
You're goopy snake: hitting yourself is no concern! The intersected segments happily oblige and slip-slide
    out of the way. Your goal: find the drain and slip-slop down it.
Contort into whatever shape you need to and solve puzzles as a slime snake!

Controls are:
WASD or arrow keys to movespace to huck an apple back upq to quitr to resetm to toggle sound! <- (this one wasnt communicated within the game at all lol)secret button combinations that are a secretttt

Made for GMTK 2025! I made all the art and programmed this in PixiJS with Vite build tooling ^_^

    cheaters only section
    I left developer shortcuts in the game! So that you can get back faster if u lose your progress. They include the following:
    
            
        
            
                1+2+3
                go to debug page (includes cut/weird levels + the hub levels)
            
            
                2+b+q
                complete current level
            
                1+4+b+↑
                complete all levels

details.title: Draftula
details.description:
Please Note: I'm using experimental branch of Godot for my web builds, so there may be issues depending on what browser you are using. If you run into any issues, please let me know what browser you are playing it on as well. In the worst case scenario, it may be better to download the Windows version instead.

Every 100  years, Count Draftula returns to wreck havoc on this Mortal World. He remains in power until a hero of mankind strong enough to defeat him shows up to topple his reign.
But before that, Draftula has to build his castle first. 
Build up the castle by placing rooms strategically to get bonuses. Spend Gems between centuries to get new rooms and build your home ever higher. Will you be able to build a Castle tall enough to escape this loop of Rebirth and Defeat.

details.title: Cooking (by the) Numbers
details.description:
Made in 96 hours for the GMTK Game Jam 2025.
Theme: LOOP

Robots need to eat too.

Create an interconnected machine that will produce the perfect numbered meal for your hungry robotic clients. Insert a starter number and watch it get modified by nodes using mathematical equations.
It's a puzzle game in which levels have multiple solutions. You construct your answer!

Controls:
Left Mouse Button - grab and move nodes and number balls.
Right Mouse Button - delete nodes and lines.
(To delete a placed connection point, aim at the tile's edge and press RMB)

game.title: While 1
game.short_text: ​Ever wonder what happens when you accidentally run an infinite loop?

details.title: While 1
details.description:
Ever wonder what happens when you accidentally run an infinite loop? Use your mouse to avoid obstacles and keep the loop going!
Made for GMTK 2025. With the exception of the music, this was my first solo dev jam entry. Hope you enjoy!
How to play:
Mouse movement to move around the screen"F" or "F11" to toggle fullscreenFor accessibility, "F1" to skip to the next level if you need it
Music used (with explicit permission) by Lchavasse: https://www.youtube.com/@Lchavasse/videosIf your computer is blocking the .zip download, try the Installer Option!

details.title: Caw Across Time
details.description:
Ring ring, it's your future cawing! In Caw Across Time, you play as a curious crow attempting to solve the mystery of a strange ancient clocktower.

Request items from your future self to solve puzzles, but be sure to close each time loop to maintain the law of caw-sality!
Originally made in 96 hours for the GMTK Game Jam 2025!______________________________________________________
CONTROLS:
WASDMove and jumpLeft ClickCall / Request ObjectsEInteractPSkip levelRRestart LevelQDrop KeyFSwitch SelvesESCMenu / Hang up phone
